title: bupleurum nordmannianum
intro: Bupleurum nordmannianum, also known as Chinese thorowax or Chinese kuchung, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum nordmannianum include reducing fever, relieving liver and gallbladder disorders, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, Bupleurum nordmannianum is often combined with other herbs, such as ginseng and licorice root, and is typically consumed as a decoction or tincture.
